basic_details.job_title: DMHO West Khasi Hills Nutritionist cum Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Medical and Health Office Medical Office (DMHO West Khasi Hills)
basic_details.short_information: District Medical and Health Office Medical Office, West Khasi Hills (DMHO West Khasi Hills) Nutritionist cum Counsellor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DMHO West Khasi Hills. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DMHO West Khasi Hills Nutritionist cum Counsellor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Dietetics & Nutrition or M.Sc Food Service Management and Dietetics
qualification.details: Nutritionist cum Counsellor: M.Sc in Dietetics & Nutrition or M.Sc Food Service Management and Dietetics

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHO West Khasi Hills Nutritionist cum Counsellor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://nhmwkh.125mb.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DMHO West Khasi Hills Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHO West Khasi Hills Nutritionist cum Counsellor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: http://nhmwkh.125mb.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DMHO West Khasi Hills Nutritionist cum Counsellor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the DMHO West Khasi Hills Nutritionist cum Counsellor Recruitment 2026 is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc in Dietetics & Nutrition or M.Sc Food Service Management and Dietetics to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the DMHO West Khasi Hills recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor post will be as per NHM norms.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection methods for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website: http://nhmwkh.125mb.com.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NST/183-III/NHM/HR/2025-26/546.

faq.question: Q10. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the District Medical and Health Office Medical Office (DMHO) in West Khasi Hills, Meghalaya.
